content:
<USER_REQUEST>
Add contact photo support and implement Mark All As Read in the SMSentry conversation list.

Working directory: D:\SMSentry

## Task 1: Contact Photo Avatars
File: `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\ui\conversations\ConversationListScreen.kt`

Read lines 355-400 first. Currently the avatar area (lines 363-392) shows a colored letter circle. The `conversation.photoUri` field is already populated with contact photo URIs but NEVER rendered.

Replace the letter-only avatar with a contact photo + letter fallback:
```kotlin
// ── Avatar ──
Box(contentAlignment = Alignment.Center) {
    if (conversation.photoUri != null) {
        // Show contact photo
        AsyncImage(
            model = conversation.photoUri,
            contentDescription = conversation.displayName,
            modifier = Modifier
                .size(52.dp)
                .clip(CircleShape),
            contentScale = ContentScale.Crop,
            // Fallback to letter avatar on error
            error = painterResource(id = R.drawable.ic_contact_placeholder),
        )
    } else {
        // Letter avatar fallback
        Box(
            modifier = Modifier
                .size(52.dp)
                .clip(CircleShape)
                .background(avatarColor.copy(alpha = 0.15f)),
            contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
        ) {
            Text(
                text = avatarLetter,
                color = avatarColor,
                fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
                fontSize = 20.sp
            )
        }
    }
    // Risk indicator dot
    if (conversation.isFlagged) { ... keep existing ... }
}
```

HOWEVER: Using Coil's `AsyncImage` requires adding the Coil dependency. Check if `coil-compose` is already in `D:\SMSentry\app\build.gradle.kts`. If NOT, instead of adding a new dependency, use the Android ContentResolver approach:
```kotlin
if (conversation.photoUri != null) {
    val bitmap = remember(conversation.photoUri) {
        try {
            val uri = Uri.parse(conversation.
<truncated 9 bytes>

            val inputStream = context.contentResolver.openInputStream(uri)
            android.graphics.BitmapFactory.decodeStream(inputStream)
        } catch (e: Exception) { null }
    }
    if (bitmap != null) {
        Image(
            bitmap = bitmap.asImageBitmap(),
            contentDescription = conversation.displayName,
            modifier = Modifier.size(52.dp).clip(CircleShape),
            contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
        )
    } else {
        // letter fallback
    }
} else {
    // letter fallback
}
```

Add necessary imports: `android.net.Uri`, `androidx.compose.ui.graphics.asImageBitmap`, `androidx.compose.foundation.Image` if not present.

## Task 2: Mark All As Read
File: `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\ui\conversations\ConversationListScreen.kt`
File: `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\ui\conversations\ConversationListViewModel.kt`

Currently at line 150-153 in the Screen there's a no-op DropdownMenuItem:
```kotlin
DropdownMenuItem(
    text = { Text("Mark all as read") },
    onClick = { showOverflowMenu = false }
)
```

Add to ViewModel:
```kotlin
fun markAllAsRead() {
    viewModelScope.launch {
        withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
            try {
                val values = android.content.ContentValues()
                values.put(Telephony.Sms.READ, 1)
                context.contentResolver.update(
                    Telephony.Sms.CONTENT_URI,
                    values,
                    "${Telephony.Sms.READ} = 0",
                    null
                )
            } catch (e: Exception) {
                Log.e(TAG, "Failed to mark all as read", e)
            }
        }
        refresh()
    }
}
```

Update the Screen DropdownMenuItem onClick to call `viewModel.markAllAsRead()`:
```kotlin
onClick = {
    showOverflowMenu = false
    viewModel.markAllAsRead()
}
```

DO NOT modify any other files. Verify build after changes.
</USER_REQUEST>

"✅ Both tasks completed and build verified (BUILD SUCCESSFUL).

**Changes made:**

### Task 1: Contact Photo Avatars
